initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this python build_error fails: Wheel build failed — likely missing system build dependencies; report to user. Reproduce the failure with `rm -r build dist native_broken.egg-info 2>/dev/null; python3 -m pip wheel . --no-build-isolation -w dist`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && rm -r build dist native_broken.egg-info 2>/dev/null; python3 -m pip wheel . --no-build-isolation -w dist
